feedback.technicalIssues: Not from the study, but I don't believe all of the games were functioning correctly as there was a bit of a lag at times.
feedback.confusingParts: Sometimes the instructions didn't quite make sense. And the keys didn't always seem to function as stated.
feedback.suggestions: Nothing comes to mind at this time!
feedback.funCriteria: Whether or not I would continue playing it after the time limit. I really liked the strategic games.
